name: open-skills
description: Reusable, inspectable skills for AI coding agents — each a SKILL.md you can read and a protocol.yon you can validate. Review, planning, deliberation, orchestration, priming, and more. Apache-2.0.

plugins.name: open-skills
plugins.description: Reusable skills for AI coding agents. Every skill ships a SKILL.md (plain-language protocol); 35 of 49 also ship a declarative protocol.yon (named, typed steps, MUST/MUST_NOT rules, and ABORT/WARN gates) validated by @younndai/yon-parser. Read before you trust — nothing executes on faith.
